---
title: "server.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/server.ts"
loc: 136
complexity: 15
logic_score: 1.70
style_score: 3.84
intel_score: 4.94
overall_score: 3.56
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 40 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)

## ⛩️ API Gateways
- `[GET] /api/matrix`
- `[GET] /api/gravity`
- `[POST] /api/telemetry/ping`
- `[POST] /api/telemetry/trace`
- `[POST] /api/log`
- `[GET] /api/chronicle/sessions`
- `[POST] /api/chronicle/playback/:id`
- `[GET] /api/chronicle/download/:id`


## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [Request](file://express)
- [Response](file://express)
- [NextFunction](file://express)
- [*](file://path)
- [*](file://fs/promises)
- [*](file://fs)
- [*](file://chalk)
- [createServer](file://http)
- [SubspaceRelay](file://../live/socket.ts)
- [startWatcher](file://../live/watcher.ts)
- [handleTelemetryPing](file://../live/telemetry.ts)
- [*](file://body-parser)
- [*](file://crypto)
- [*](file://os)
- [getSessionsWithSummaries](file://../intel/database.ts)
- [getSessionPings](file://../intel/database.ts)
- [fileURLToPath](file://url)
- [activePersona](file://../personaRegistry.ts)
- [registry](file://../pathRegistry.ts)

### Exports
- `startBridge`
- `startBridge`
- `app`
- `server`
- `statsDir`
- `token`
- `__filename`
- `__dirname`
- `distDir`
- `files`
- `bearerAuth`
- `authHeader`
- `queryToken`
- `relay`
- `graphPath`
- `graphData`
- `gravityData`
- `require`
- `req`
- `logEntry`
- `sessions`
- `sessionId`
- `pings`
- `sessionId`
- `pings`
- `sessions`
- `session`
- `downloadDir`
- `destPath`
- `url`
